The '''Lurrian rimebat''' was a sluggish [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Bat/Legends|bat]] that dwelt in cold environments on [[Lur]]. The population of Lurrian rimebats were among the millions of aquatic creatures living in the [[Royal Icqui Aquaria]] on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
